title: rubus schummelii f. micans
intro: Rubus schummelii f. micans, also known as the Schummel's black raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rubus schummelii plant, a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to the United States. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus schummelii f. micans include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus schummelii f. micans can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
